G0.label:
case swap
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
xs ys : List α
f : α → β
xs✝ ys✝ : List α
x✝ y✝ : α
a✝ : xs✝ ↭ ys✝
a_ih✝ : List.map f xs✝ ↭ List.map f ys✝
⊢ List.map f (x✝ :: y✝ :: xs✝) ↭ List.map f (y✝ :: x✝ :: ys✝)
